instruction: Use 'アバター' when referring to a VRChat avatar. Use 'モデル' for 3D models in general, or a AI model.
Use 'アバター改変' (or just '改変' when the context is clear) for VRChat avatar modifications.
Use 'ギミック' for VRChat avatar props, effects, or interactive features.
Use 'PhysBone' for VRChat avatar physics bones.
Use 'Booth' when referring to Booth the online store.
Use 'Unity' when referring to the Unity game engine.
Use 'フレンド' for online or in-game friends, and '友達' for real-life friends. Use 'フレンド申請' for sending a friend request in VRChat.

keywords: 蓝灯; on blue; blue status
instruction: "Use '青ステータス' for the 'Join me' status or the 'blue status' in VRChat. Use this term only for VRChat status
column3: and not for general use of the color."

keywords: 绿灯; on green; green status
instruction: "Use '緑ステータス' for the 'Online' status or the 'green status' in VRChat. Use this term only for VRChat status
column3: and not for general use of the color."

keywords: 黄灯; 橙灯; on orange; orange status; on yellow; yellow status
instruction: "Use 'オレンジステータス' for the 'Ask me' status or the 'orange/yellow status' in VRChat. Use this term only for VRChat status
column3: and not for general use of the color."

keywords: 红灯; on red; red status
instruction: "Use '赤ステータス' for the 'Do Not Disturb' status or the 'red status' in VRChat. Use this term only for VRChat status
column3: and not for general use of the color."

keywords: 世界; 地图; world; map
instruction: Use 'ワールド' for a VRChat world, and '世界' for the general term 'world'.

keywords: 实例; 房间; instance; room
instruction: Use 'インスタンス' when referring to a specific session or 'instance' of a VRChat world.
Use 'パブリック' for the VRChat instance type 'public'.

keywords: 好友+; 好友加; friends+; friends plus
instruction: Use 'フレプラ' for the VRChat instance type 'friends+'.
Use 'フレオン' for the friends-only instance type 'friends only'.
Use 'インバイト' or 'プラベ' or 'プライベートなインスタンス' for the VRChat instance type 'invite' or 'private'.
Use 'ポータル' for a VRChat portal.
Use 'お砂糖' for VRChat relationship slang if the word is referring to the affectionate term.
Use '無言勢' for players who do not speak by voice.

keywords: 摸摸; 摸头; pat; headpat
instruction: Use '撫でる' or 'なでなで' for headpats.
"A broad Chinese slang term for affectionate physical closeness in VRChat. It may mean staying close
column7: or flirtatious/couple-like interaction. Choose the Japanese rendering based on context. When in doubt

instruction: Use 'V睡' for sleeping in VRChat.
"Use 'V感' for the psychological phenomena experienced among some VRChat users
column3: where one may perceive physical sensations from actions and stimuli
column4: from their avatar within virtual reality."

keywords: 桌面; 桌面模式; desktop
instruction: Use 'デスクトップ' for non-VR desktop play mode.
Use '3点トラッキング' for headset-and-controller tracking.

keywords: 全身追踪; 全追; full body tracking; full-body; FBT
instruction: Use 'フルトラ' (or 'フルボディトラッキング' when other users are asking for clarification) for full-body tracking.
Use 'Quest勢' for players using Meta Quest headsets.
Use '単機勢' for players using standalone headsets.

keywords: 安卓; 苹果; ios; 手机; mobile
instruction: Use 'スマホ勢' for players using VRChat Mobile on Android or iOS.
